action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Non-food contact surface or equipment made of unacceptable material, not kept clean, or not properly sealed, raised, spaced or movable to allow accessibility for cleaning on all sides, above and underneath the unit.

Anti-siphonage or back-flow prevention device not provided where required; equipment or floor not properly drained; sewage disposal system in disrepair or not functioning properly. Condensation or liquid waste improperly disposed of.

action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Sign prohibiting smoking or using electronic cigarettes not conspicuously posted.
Sanitized equipment or utensil, including in-use food dispensing utensil, improperly used or stored.

Anti-siphonage or back-flow prevention device not provided where required; equipment or floor not properly drained; sewage disposal system in disrepair or not functioning properly. Condensation or liquid waste improperly disposed of.
